planTitle: Refactor Router to support dual HTTP/HTTPS listeners
summary: Added dual HTTP/HTTPS listener. HTTP uses net.Listen + http.Server with Gin engine; HTTPS path uses autocert.Manager with TLS-ALPN-01 on :443 when https.yml enabled/valid. Shutdown now stops both servers with timeout. Updated cmd/server/main.go to load https.yml and call router.Start. Verified go build ./... and go test ./internal/api -v pass.
